testsuite.name: org.hyperledger.iroha.android.GradleAndroidHarnessTests
testsuite.system-out: [IrohaAndroid] OkHttpTransportExecutorFactory tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] OkHttpWebSocketConnectorTests passed. [IrohaAndroid] OkHttpTransportExecutor transport tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] OkHttpTelemetryIntegrationTests passed. [IrohaAndroid] HttpSafetyDetectOkHttpTests passed.
testsuite.system-err: 12月 08, 2025 4:31:43 午後 okhttp3.internal.platform.Platform log 警告: A connection to http://localhost:60654/ was leaked. Did you forget to close a response body? To see where this was allocated, set the OkHttpClient logger level to FINE: Logger.getLogger(OkHttpClient.class.getName()).setLevel(Level.FINE);
